title: struct in6_addr fallback risks ODR violation on new platforms
description: ipv6_addr.h:47-64 — Multi-guard detection (IN6ADDR_ANY_INIT, _NETINET_IN_H, etc) is fragile. New platforms with different guards cause 'redefinition' errors. Comment acknowledges but no tooling help.
close_reason: Added LICHEN_HAVE_IN6_ADDR override macro for platform portability
